positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial compass embedded within a geometric stained-glass frame. The compass points are represented by minimalist constellations (e.g., Orion, Ursa Major) drawn in fine line work, radiating outward from a central, glowing core. Use deep midnight blues, regal golds, and emerald greens. The style should be Neo-Art Deco mixed with scientific illustration, featuring clean lines and high contrast. The overall composition must be highly detailed, central, and printable on fabric, emphasizing crisp edges and impactful color blocking. The background should be solid and dark, allowing the stained-glass effect to pop, making it perfect for a repeating or single-placement print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, gradient, photo, realism, dirty, messy, messy edges
